title: SQL Foundations
subtitle: Learn to read tables, write SELECT queries, filter rows, sort results, and handle real-world beginner data.
learningGoals: Explain what SQL does in plain language.
Identify tables, rows, columns, records, fields, and simple keys.
Write basic SELECT queries against one table.
Choose specific columns instead of always using SELECT *.
Combine conditions with AND, OR, and NOT.
Search text using LIKE and wildcards.
Filter lists and ranges using IN, NOT IN, and BETWEEN.
Find missing values using IS NULL and IS NOT NULL.
Read query results and explain them in plain English.
